title: microcitrus australis
intro: Microcitrus australis, also known as the desert lime, is a small to medium-sized shrub native to Western Australia, belonging to the Rutaceae family. It is rich in vitamin C and has been traditionally used in Australian Aboriginal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include treating coughs, colds, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Microcitrus australis include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it a popular natural remedy for wound healing and reducing inflammation. Microcitrus australis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or juice for medicinal use, and it is often combined with other herbs in traditional herbal preparations.
